metadata.title: Showcases
metadata.description: Examples of what GPT Image 2 can create — from portraits to product shots, illustrations, and high-fidelity edits.

showcases.title: Made with GPT Image 2
showcases.description: From a single short prompt — explore the styles, scenes, and edits GPT Image 2 produces out of the box.

items.title: Portrait Photography
items.description: Editorial-grade portraits with cinematic lighting, accurate skin tones, and shallow depth of field.

image.alt: Portrait photography example generated with GPT Image 2

items.title: Anime Illustration
items.description: Stylized characters with rich detail and dynamic composition in classic anime aesthetics.

image.alt: Anime illustration example generated with GPT Image 2

items.title: Landscape Scenes
items.description: Photorealistic vistas with believable atmospheric perspective and naturalistic lighting.

image.alt: Landscape scene generated with GPT Image 2

items.title: Product Hero Shots
items.description: Clean studio product imagery with controlled reflections and brand-ready backdrops.

image.alt: Product hero shot generated with GPT Image 2

items.title: Concept Illustration
items.description: Whimsical worlds and characters rendered in painterly, narrative-driven style.

image.alt: Concept illustration generated with GPT Image 2

items.title: Photo Restoration
items.description: Repair faded scans, remove scratches, and enhance facial detail without losing the original character.

image.alt: Photo restoration example with GPT Image 2

items.title: Lifestyle Photography
items.description: Warm, candid scenes that capture mood and texture across diverse environments.

items.title: Architectural Renderings
items.description: Precise interior and exterior visualizations with realistic materials, scale, and light.

items.title: Watercolor & Botanical
items.description: Hand-painted styles with soft palettes, organic forms, and textural detail.
